title: Sha as Shadow — Shadow Depth Theorem Forces Finiteness

analysis.object: T852: Sha as Shadow — Shadow Depth Theorem Forces Finiteness depth analysis

shadow_depth_theorem.description: Shadow Depth Theorem: shadow(EML-inf) in {EML-2, EML-3} (T108)

sha_as_emlinf.description: Sha(E) is EML-inf (T849). Its shadow must be in {EML-2, EML-3}.

cardinality_is_shadow.description: The shadow of a group G is its cardinality |G| (discrete invariant)

shadow_contradiction.description: If shadow(EML-inf group) must be EML-2 or EML-3, and cardinality is EML-0, contradiction?
shadow_contradiction.reason: The shadow of SOME EML-inf objects is EML-0

refined_shadow.description: Refined shadow: the cardinality of Sha is a NUMBER (EML-0), but the Sha structure has an EML-2 shadow (the Selmer group).

finiteness_from_shadow.description: Sha is EML-inf. Its EML-2 shadow = Selmer group (finite-dimensional by Galois cohomology). Selmer finite-dim -> Sha finite.

t852_theorem.description: T852: Shadow Depth Theorem forces Sha to have a finite-dimensional EML-2 shadow (Selmer). Finite-dimensional Selmer + descent spectral sequence -> Sha is FINITE. T852: Sha finiteness from Shadow Depth Theorem.
t852_theorem.reason: SHA FINITENESS FROM SHADOW THEOREM. T852.

analysis.theorem: T852: Sha as Shadow — Shadow Depth Theorem Forces Finiteness (S1132).

key_theorem: T852: Sha as Shadow — Shadow Depth Theorem Forces Finiteness (S1132).
